ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

We hope you’re enjoying the benefits of our SaaS platform. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription will automatically renew on 15th August 2026. Your account will be charged ₹5,999.00 for the next billing cycle.

To review or change your plan, log in to your dashboard here: <URL>. If you wish to upgrade, downgrade, or cancel, you can do so anytime before the renewal date.

Thank you for choosing us. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@example.com.

Best regards,
[Company Name] Team

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

This is an urgent notice from FedEx. Your recent shipment (Tracking # 12345678) was not delivered due to a missed pickup. As a result, a delivery fee of ₹1,200.00 has been applied. To avoid additional charges, please confirm payment within 24 hours.

Click here to pay: <URL>.

If you believe this is a mistake, contact our customer service immediately.

Regards,
FedEx Delivery Team
